projectDescription:
This game was made as a final project for CMPM 120 at the University of California, Santa Cruz. It is one of the first large scale game projects that I’ve worked on and features many interested elements that are a first for me:
1.	A randomly generated map from a pool of 16 different rooms
2.	Multiple enemy types with various behaviors and a health system
a.	One even uses A* to pathfind to the player while they move.
